seoDescription: Read how Palm & Light Coffee collects, uses, and protects your information across our website and services.
title: Privacy Policy
intro: This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have. It applies to our website, inquiry forms, and communications.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body1: We may collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and any details you include in inquiry forms or messages.
sections.body2: We may also collect technical information automatically, such as browser type, pages visited, referral links, and approximate location based on IP address.

sections.title: How We Use Information
sections.body1: We use information to respond to requests, improve our website, share updates you opt into, and maintain service quality and security.
sections.body2: We process information only when needed for legitimate business operations or to meet legal obligations.

sections.title: Cookies and Analytics
sections.body1: Our site may use cookies and similar technologies to remember preferences, understand traffic trends, and improve performance.
sections.body2: You can manage or disable cookies in your browser settings, though some website features may be limited.

sections.title: Information Sharing
sections.body1: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with trusted service providers who help operate the website, process communications, or support analytics.
sections.body2: These providers are expected to handle data securely and only for the services they provide to us.

sections.title: Data Retention and Security
sections.body1: We retain information only as long as reasonably necessary for the purposes described in this policy or as required by law.
sections.body2: We maintain reasonable safeguards to protect information, but no internet transmission or storage system can be guaranteed 100% secure.

sections.title: Your Rights and Choices
sections.body1: Depending on your location, you may have rights to request access, correction, deletion, or limitation of your personal information.
sections.body2: To make a request, contact us using the details below. We may need to verify your identity before completing the request.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: If you have privacy questions or requests, please contact our team.
